 {"id":"bd-bs5j","title":"Release v0.33.2","description":"Version bump workflow for beads release 0.33.2.

## Variables
- `0.33.2` - The new version number (e.g., 0.31.0)
- `2025-12-21` - Release date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

## Workflow Steps
1. Kill running daemons
2. Run tests and linting
3. Bump version in all files (10 files total)
4. Update cmd/bd/info.go with release notes
5. Commit and push version bump
6. Create and push git tag
7. Update Homebrew formula
8. Upgrade local Homebrew installation
9. Verify installation

## Files Updated by bump-version.sh
- cmd/bd/version.go
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
- integrations/beads-mcp/pyproject.toml
- integrations/beads-mcp/src/beads_mcp/__init__.py
- README.md
- npm-package/package.json
- cmd/bd/templates/hooks/* (4 files)
- CHANGELOG.md

## Manual Step Required
- cmd/bd/info.go - Add versionChanges entry with release notes","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-21T16:10:13.759062-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T17:29:31.791368-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-21T17:29:31.791368-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"epic"}

 {"id":"bd-bt6y","title":"Improve compact/daemon/merge documentation and UX","description":"Multiple documentation and UX issues encountered:
1. "bd compact --analyze" fails with misleading "requires SQLite storage" error when daemon is running. Needs --no-daemon or better error.
2. "bd merge" help text is outdated (refers to 3-way merge instead of issue merging).
3. Daemon mode purpose isn't clear to local-only users.
4. Compact/cleanup commands are hard to discover.

Proposed fixes:
- Fix compact+daemon interaction or error message.
- Update "bd merge" help text.
- Add "when to use daemon" section to docs.
- Add maintenance section to quickstart.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-20T18:55:43.637047-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-09T18:38:37.684256672-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T23:10:43.884784-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-buol","title":"Invert control for compact: provide tools for agent-driven compaction","description":"Currently compact requires Anthropic API key because bd calls the AI directly. This is backwards - we should provide tools (like all other bd commands) that let an AI agent perform the compaction. The agent decides what to keep/merge, not bd.
